queries.question: Tell me about the types and descriptions of the promotions every streaming company is running.
queries.sql: SELECT Content_Promotions.type, Content_Promotions.description  from Streamings_Content_Promotions join Content_Promotions on Streamings_Content_Promotions.content_promotion_type_id = Content_Promotions.id join Streamings on Streamings_Content_Promotions.streaming_id = Streamings.id   GROUP BY Streamings_Content_Promotions.content_promotion_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streamings_Content_Promotions.streaming_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streamings)

queries.question: Tell me about the types and descriptions of the promotions every streaming company is running.
queries.sql: select streamings.title , content_promotions.type , content_promotions.description from Streamings_Content_Promotions join Content_Promotions on Streamings_Content_Promotions.content_promotion_type_id = Content_Promotions.id join Streamings on Streamings_Content_Promotions.streaming_id = Streamings.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/streamingservice/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?type ?description WHERE {
  ?streamings_content_promotions a :Streamings_Content_Promotions .
  ?content_promotions a :Content_Promotions .
  ?streamings_content_promotions p:hasContent_Promotions ?content_promotions .
  ?streamings a :Streamings .
  ?streamings_content_promotions p:hasStreamings ?streamings .
  ?streamings p:title ?title .
  ?content_promotions p:type ?type .
  ?content_promotions p:description ?description .
}

queries.question: Please provide the description of content promotions that is consistent across all streamings
queries.sql: SELECT Content_Promotions.description  from Streamings_Content_Promotions join Content_Promotions on Streamings_Content_Promotions.content_promotion_type_id = Content_Promotions.id join Streamings on Streamings_Content_Promotions.streaming_id = Streamings.id   GROUP BY Streamings_Content_Promotions.content_promotion_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streamings_Content_Promotions.streaming_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streamings)

queries.question: What promotions are available for each streaming service
queries.sql: SELECT Content_Promotions.type  from Streamings_Content_Promotions join Content_Promotions on Streamings_Content_Promotions.content_promotion_type_id = Content_Promotions.id join Streamings on Streamings_Content_Promotions.streaming_id = Streamings.id   GROUP BY Streamings_Content_Promotions.content_promotion_type_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Streamings_Content_Promotions.streaming_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Streamings)

queries.question: What descriptions of content promotions are associated with each streaming service?
